name: How can I get back to default personalization backgrounds colors, etc.
snippet: You should be able to revert to the default 'Windows' theme using the Settings app (Settings > Personalisation > Themes > Apply a theme > Windows).

name: Customizing the appearance of Windows 10 | Microsoft Press Store
